productDisplayName: Nike Women's Izanami White Blue Shoe
description: Take the lead in a throwback design with the nike Izanami women's shoe, an updated take on a classic running shoe with a sleek, low-profile silhouette.Upper Leather upper with glossy nike swoosh on the side Stitch detailing to further add to the structure Minimal lining on the collar and tongue for lightweight Midsole Soft, cushioned footbed for all day step-in comfort Outsole Rubber outsole for durability and traction Forefoot traction pattern for stability Shoe careBrush off dirt with a leather brushUse a branded leather shoe polish to retain the sheen
